title: E6: Lint #26 narrow_too_few + hint-silence-counter telemetry
description: Add lint check #26 narrow_too_few: if count(narrow_with_paths) / count(total) < 0.20 AND total ≥ 10 → recommends fabric-import. Hint-silence-counter telemetry: PreToolUse hook increments .fabric/.cache/hint-silence-counter when matched-narrow == 0; doctor reads counter and reports hint silence rate > 95% over 30-day window as same fabric-import recommendation. Anchor: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for E6.

files.change: Add #26 narrow_too_few check: count narrow-with-paths vs total; threshold 0.20 with min total 10; also check hint silence rate >95% over 30d window
When narrow_match_count == 0, append timestamp line to .fabric/.cache/hint-silence-counter

implementation: Add inspectNarrowTooFew() in doctor.ts: iterate all canonical entries; compute narrow_with_paths = entries.filter(e => e.relevance_scope === 'narrow' && e.relevance_paths.length > 0).length; total = entries.length; if (narrow_with_paths / total) < 0.20 && total >= 10 → recommend fabric-import

Add inspectHintSilenceRate(): read .fabric/.cache/hint-silence-counter (timestamps); read total PreToolUse invocations (could derive from edit-counter); compute silence_rate over 30d window; if >95% → recommend fabric-import (same recommendation message as #26)
Register both inspections in doctor.ts checks array
Modify knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs: in the silent branch (narrow_match_count==0), append Date.now() to .fabric/.cache/hint-silence-counter
Unit tests: #26 ratio threshold; silence rate threshold; recommendation message consistency

reference.examples: Mirror E5 sidecar pattern; doctor lint pattern from rc.5 TASK-013

criteria: doctor lint #26 narrow_too_few: count(narrow with paths) / total < 0.20 AND total ≥ 10 → recommends fabric-import
PreToolUse silent-counter telemetry: .fabric/.cache/hint-silence-counter tracks silent rate over 30-day window
doctor reports hint silence rate > 95% over 30 days as same fabric-import recommendation
Both checks emit the same recommendation message (fabric-import re-run)

rationale.chosen_approach: Two-pronged: structural ratio check + behavioral silence-rate check; both point to same fabric-import recommendation
decision_factors: Structural catches static KB shape issues
Behavioral catches usage-pattern mismatch even with healthy KB shape
rationale.tradeoffs: Two signals may trigger together (redundant message); acceptable (clearer signal to user)

manual_checks: Seed KB with 11 entries, 1 narrow-with-paths → lint #26 fires
Seed silence-counter with 96% rate over 30d → silence-rate lint fires
Seed KB with 5 entries → lint #26 silent (below min total)

risks.description: Silence rate compute requires both edit-counter + silence-counter aligned
risks.mitigation: Silence-counter alone is sufficient (denominator = edit-counter line count in 30d window)
risks.fallback: Approximate denominator as 1 if edit-counter missing
